mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id, user_name, FALSE AS is_owner, counsel_type, comment_count, is_private, create_date, modified_date FROM counseling_post ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
id title counsel_type create_date
ASC DESC
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, is_private, create_date, modified_date FROM counseling_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, is_private, create_date, modified_date FROM counseling_post WHERE id = #{postId}
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, is_private, create_date, modified_date FROM counseling_post WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counseling_post (title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, is_private, create_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{counselType}, 0, #{isPrivate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE counseling_post SET comment_count = #{commentCount}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE counseling_post SET is_private = #{isPrivate}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE counseling_post SET title = #{params.title}, content = #{params.content}, phone = #{params.phone}, email = #{params.email}, counsel_type = #{params.counselType}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
